errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

errors.weakPassword: Password does not meet the security requirements.

errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please try again in a moment.
errors.otpDisabled: No account found for this email. Please register first.
errors.recoveryLinkInvalid: This recovery link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
